name: First Mate Filch
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing a brown shirt and burgundy linens with a brass ring. Armed with a steel cutlass.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: pirate, first mate, disgruntled, hostile, aggressive, greedy, impatient
Role: First Mate Filch is the first mate of the Sea Tub Clarabella, a pirate ship docked in Anvil. He is disgruntled with the crew's recent moderate loot hauls, as evidenced by a note he gave to the captain expressing his dissatisfaction. He carries the key to the Sea Tub Clarabella and is hostile, attacking intruders on sight.
Home Location Information: The Sea Tub Clarabella, a pirate ship docked in Anvil.
Daily Routine: Filch spends his entire time wandering around the lower decks of the Clarabella, waiting to attack any intruders who board the ship.
Personality - The Greedy Pirate: Filch is dissatisfied with the crew's recent earnings and is vocal about his discontent with the captain. Unlike the romantic image of adventurous pirates, he spends his days below deck, acting as aggressive security for the ship. His greed and impatience with moderate success have left him disgruntled and dangerous.
author: Bethesda
